posts.text: All my recent videos have been hit with copyright claims this week over 4 second music clips that are imo completely fair use. Publishing companies are now stuffing my videos with ads & taking all the revenue. I don't know if it's worth fighting it, I might just have to hack these moments out of the videos.
I guess Sony Music Entertainment hasn't made enough money from My Heart Will Go On, they need to monetize my Twilight video to keep the lights on.

What's maddening is that these claims don't get made automatically upon upload (when you'd have time to re-edit the video). They don't want you to not use the song, they want you to use it so they insert 30 midroll ads in your video and take all your money.

So guys from Palm Beach just look like that


Palm Beach Pete (@not_jeffepstein)

Hello this Palm Beach Pete just wanted to thank everybody for the support and good vibes… I’m not Jeffrey Epstein

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/not_jeffepstein/status/2035004582825185726#m

Chuck brought martial arts and the warmth of his character to millions around the world.

May his memory be a blessing.
